name: PaidAll
author: NoobMCBG
readme_markdown:
## General | **Plugins** | **PaidAll** | | --- | --- | | **API** | **** | | **Version** | **** | | **Download** | **** | | **Total Download** | **** |
>- Paid money to all people online 鉁旓笍 >- Automatically Paid When 2 Types of Plugins `EconomyAPI` or `BedrockEconomy` 鉁旓笍
## Features >- Paid money to all people online >- Automatically Paid When 2 Types of Plugins `EconomyAPI` or `BedrockEconomy`
## Commands | **Commands** | **Description** | **Aliases** | | --- | --- | --- | | **/paidall** | **Commands paid all players online** | **[pa, payall]** |
## Permissions | **Permission** | **Description** | **Default** | | --- | --- | --- | | **`paidall.paid`** | **Permission use commands /paidall** | **true** |
## Config ```yaml --- # 鈻堚枅鈻堚枅鈻堚枅鈺椻枒鈻戔枅鈻堚枅鈻堚枅鈺椻枒鈻堚枅鈺椻枅鈻堚枅鈻堚枅鈻堚晽鈻戔枒鈻堚枅鈻堚枅鈻堚晽鈻戔枅鈻堚晽鈻戔枒鈻戔枒鈻戔枅鈻堚晽鈻戔枒鈻戔枒鈻慭n# 鈻堚枅鈺斺晲鈺愨枅鈻堚晽鈻堚枅鈺斺晲鈺愨枅鈻堚晽鈻堚枅鈺戔枅鈻堚晹鈺愨晲鈻堚枅鈺椻枅鈻堚晹鈺愨晲鈻堚枅鈺椻枅鈻堚晳鈻戔枒鈻戔枒鈻戔枅鈻堚晳鈻戔枒鈻戔枒鈻慭n# 鈻堚枅鈻堚枅鈻堚枅鈺斺暆鈻堚枅鈻堚枅鈻堚枅鈻堚晳鈻堚枅鈺戔枅鈻堚晳鈻戔枒鈻堚枅鈺戔枅鈻堚枅鈻堚枅鈻堚枅鈺戔枅鈻堚晳鈻戔枒鈻戔枒鈻戔枅鈻堚晳鈻戔枒鈻戔枒鈻慭n# 鈻堚枅鈺斺晲鈺愨晲鈺濃枒鈻堚枅鈺斺晲鈺愨枅鈻堚晳鈻堚枅鈺戔枅鈻堚晳鈻戔枒鈻堚枅鈺戔枅鈻堚晹鈺愨晲鈻堚枅鈺戔枅鈻堚晳鈻戔枒鈻戔枒鈻戔枅鈻堚晳鈻戔枒鈻戔枒鈻慭n# 鈻堚枅鈺戔枒鈻戔枒鈻戔枒鈻堚枅鈺戔枒鈻戔枅鈻堚晳鈻堚枅鈺戔枅鈻堚枅鈻堚枅鈻堚晹鈺濃枅鈻堚晳鈻戔枒鈻堚枅鈺戔枅鈻堚枅鈻堚枅鈻堚枅鈺椻枅鈻堚枅鈻堚枅鈻堚枅鈺梊n# 鈺氣晲鈺濃枒鈻戔枒鈻戔枒鈺氣晲鈺濃枒鈻戔暁鈺愨暆鈺氣晲鈺濃暁鈺愨晲鈺愨晲鈺愨暆鈻戔暁鈺愨暆鈻戔枒鈺氣晲鈺濃暁鈺愨晲鈺愨晲鈺愨晲鈺濃暁鈺愨晲鈺愨晲鈺愨晲鈺漒n # Message Paid Successfully # Use {money} to show the amount that player paid paid-successfully: msg: true # false = disable, true = enable; msg-paid-successfully: "搂a> You have just paid {money} money to all players" # Broadcast Message Paid # Use {player} to get the name of the person who paid for the whole server # Use {money} to show the amount that player paid broadcast-paid: broadcast: true # false = disable, true = enable; msg-broadcast-paid: "搂a> player {player} just paid everyone {money}$ money !" # Message Paid Fallied # Use {price} to show the additional amount to pay paid-fallied: msg: true # false = disable, true = enable; msg-paid-fallied: "You need more {price}$ money to paid all players" ... ```
## For Developer >- You can access to PaidAll by using `PaidAll::getInstance()` >- PaidAll Usage: ```php $money = 1000; PaidAll::getInstance()->paidAll($money); ```
## Install >- Step 1: Click the `Direct Download` button to download the plugin >- Step 2: move the file `PaidAll.phar` into the file `plugins` >- Step 3: Restart server for plugins to work
